macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Rises 0.8% on Oil Reversal After Trump Comments on Iran War End
items.summary: The S&P 500 Index closed up 0.8% on Monday, March 9, 2026, closing a downside gap amid an extraordinary oil price reversal following Donald Trump's comments signaling the near end of the Iran war. The index remains below the key 6900 pivot with heavy resistance overhead and broken moving averages signaling ongoing caution.[1]

items.title: S&P 500 Shows Elevated Volatility in 2026 with YTD Returns Near Zero
items.summary: In 2026, the S&P 500 has faced high volatility around 19-20% while year-to-date returns stay near 0%, resembling volatile years like 2011 and 1987. March 2026 saw a modest -0.7% decline, milder than historical drops in tariff-impacted or crisis periods.[2]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: ABB Integrates Deep Learning Vision Directly into Machine Control Systems
items.summary: ABB's B&R division announced seamless integration of AI-based machine vision into industrial automation control loops, enabling real-time vision processing with sub-microsecond synchronization between vision, motion control, and robotics without external encoders.

items.title: University of Sydney Develops Ultra-Compact Nanophotonic AI Chip Operating at Speed of Light
items.summary: Researchers built an AI chip that performs neural network calculations using light instead of electricity, achieving 90-99% accuracy on biomedical MRI image classification while consuming significantly less energy than conventional electronic chips.

items.title: Synaptics Expands Astra Edge AI Portfolio with New Microcontroller Series
items.summary: Synaptics unveiled the Astra SR80 series for premium audio applications and SRW1500 series with integrated Wi-Fi 7 connectivity, advancing AI-native microcontrollers for IoT and edge computing with enhanced security and power management.

items.title: Northwestern University Launches New AI Major Beginning Fall 2026
items.summary: Northwestern announced a new undergraduate major in artificial intelligence covering machine learning, natural language processing, and AI systems.

items.title: Veritone Launches Data Marketplace for Ethical, At-Scale AI-Ready Data Access
items.summary: Veritone introduced a new data marketplace designed to provide ethical, premium AI-ready data at scale, transforming the AI supply chain.

items.title: AI Demonstrates Significant Impact on Cybersecurity Team Performance
items.summary: Data from Hack the Box competition shows AI improves security task completion speed and solve rates, with elite teams seeing the biggest performance uplift, though experts warn against over-automating judgment-building tasks.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Samsung Showcases Glasses-Free 3D and HDR10+ Gaming at GDC 2026
items.summary: Samsung demonstrated glasses-free 3D gaming with titles like Hell is Us and Cronos: The New Dawn on its Odyssey ecosystem, expanding the library to over 120 titles by year-end. It also announced HDR10+ GAMING for Pearl Abyss's Crimson Desert launching in March.

items.title: Tencent Cloud Unveils AI-Powered Gaming Solutions at GDC 2026
items.summary: Tencent Cloud introduced AI tools for in-game communication, content production including the HY 3D AI creation engine, and security at GDC 2026. Partnerships with studios like Maxon and CGTrader aim to accelerate 3D asset creation and game development.

items.title: Nova Drift and Subnautica: Below Zero Release on Mobile Today
items.summary: Nova Drift by Chimeric LLC and Subnautica: Below Zero by Unknown Worlds launched on App Store and Google Play Store on March 10, 2026, as part of March's mobile game releases.

items.title: Xsolla Announces Participation and Innovations at GDC and PGC 2026
items.summary: Xsolla is sponsoring Pocket Gamer Connects San Francisco 2026 as platinum sponsor, focusing on monetization and AI for games, and unveiled next-era game commerce at GDC Festival of Gaming.

items.title: High-Powered Game's Crash Highlights Stakes in Impatient Market
items.summary: A high-profile game's poor performance underscores investor impatience in the gaming sector, amid ongoing issues like New York suing Valve over loot boxes.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
